definitions.text: ISO 639-2 ISO 639-5 language code for Sino-Tibetan languages.
To be in a position in which the upper body is upright and supported by the buttocks.
examples: After a long day of walking, it was good just to sit and relax.
You're finishing the chowder if you sit there (motionless) all evening!

definitions.text: To move oneself into such a position.

examples: The dishes are still sitting on the table!
The temple has sat atop that hill for centuries.

definitions.text: Subsidence of the roof of a coal mine.
An event, usually lasting one full day or more, where the primary goal is to sit in meditation.
